images.alt:
A hyper-detailed photorealistic portrait of an Egyptian-inspired jackal noblewoman seated upon an ornate stone throne within a grand temple illuminated by warm brazier firelight. She has long black hair that fades into deep emerald green at the ends, framing a poised face with luminous green eyes and a faint, knowing smile. Tall jackal ears rise above an intricate gold headdress adorned with delicate chains and emerald accents.

She wears a flowing black gown woven with subtle gold patterns and layered translucent fabrics that drape naturally over her figure and the throne. Gold-and-emerald jewelry adorns her neck, arms, ears, and waist, creating a rich interplay of color against the dark fabric. Her posture is relaxed yet authoritative, one hand resting beside her while her crossed legs and effortless composure suggest complete confidence in her surroundings.

Beside the throne sits a regal black jackal companion wearing matching emerald-and-gold ornaments. The animal's alert posture mirrors the noblewoman's calm vigilance. Ancient columns carved with hieroglyphs rise behind them, while bronze braziers cast flickering orange light across polished stone, gold surfaces, and the edges of her jewelry. A carved game board with dark pieces rests nearby, hinting at strategy, patience, and foresight.

The overall atmosphere is luxurious, mysterious, and contemplative—less a scene of overt power than one of quiet certainty. She appears not as a warrior or ruler issuing commands, but as someone who understands the game being played long before anyone else realizes they are participating.

value.text:
#opendata #artificialintelligence #ai #dataanalysis #datapipeline

You want to take The KittenBot on a walk?

Simply reply to this post and advise a city.

Then The KittenBot will dream about this city! #AIGenerated

See example below.
NB: Only followers can reply. Up to you to join the fun!

images.alt:
On Mondays and Sundays, a story will be told by The KittenBot.

The KittenBot checks the last reply of this post in order to know in which city the story should take place.


In case you want to vote for a city:

+ Please subscribe to this account (i.e. follow), and

+ Then, on the Monday of your choice (or the Sunday of your choice), before 13:00 (UTC), Please reply to this post: your reply should contain the name of the city you chose.


Example:
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "Paris,France".

Other examples:
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "Paris,FR".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,GB".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,UK".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,Ontario,CA".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,CA".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,US".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "London,Kentucky,US".
@kittenuvv.bsky.social: I choose "Milan,IT".


As shown in the example, the reply should mention me.

Please note that they are no space character before the colon character.
The whole reply should be identical as the example: only the text between the first double quote and the second double quote can be changed.


Please note that your reply must be sent:
+ after that The RandomBot chose a city.
+ before that The KittenBot starts verifying the chosen city.

The KittenBot always considers that the last reply embeds the name of the chosen city.

Indeed:

+ At 13:00 (UTC), The KittenBot checks the last post of this thread in order to know the city that was chosen. The KittenBot then tells a story that could happen in this city.

+ At 13:05 (UTC), The RandomBot randomly chooses another city. This city will be taken into account during the next run of The KittenBot if no other reply is posted.



In case you are happy with the story written by the bot, please do not hesitate to:

+ like this post, and

+ repost this post, and

+ like the reply containing the story, and

+ repost the reply containing the story.

National Cognac Day

images.alt:
Cognac is a type of brandy that is produced in the Cognac region of France. It is made from specific varieties of white grapes, primarily Ugni Blanc, but also Folle Blanche and Colombard, which are grown in the surrounding vineyards.
The wine is then double-distilled in copper pot stills and aged in French oak barrels for at least two years, although many high-quality Cognacs are aged for much longer.
Cognac is characterized by its complex flavor profile, which includes notes of fruit, vanilla, oak, and spice, as well as its smooth texture and warming finish. It is often enjoyed as a digestit, served in a snifter glass and sipped slowly to savor its unique taste and aroma.

images.alt: A semi-realistic oni noblewoman stands beneath lantern light in a moonlit shrine courtyard. Her long silver-blue hair cascades around elaborate floral ornaments and towering ivory horns, while crimson tattoos wind across her shoulder, neck, and collarbone. She wears an opulent black-and-crimson kimono embroidered with flowers, gold filigree, and skull motifs, its layered fabrics opening just enough to reveal the structure and movement of the garments beneath. One leg is subtly advanced through the parted robes, creating a poised, aristocratic stance rather than a dramatic pose. Behind her, weathered torii gates, stone lanterns, cherry blossoms, and carved demonic masks emerge from the darkness. Her expression is cool and unreadable—neither hostile nor welcoming—as if she is accustomed to being observed and entirely unconcerned by it. Warm lantern light and cool moonlight intermingle across the scene, highlighting the intricate textures of silk, jewelry, hair, and skin while preserving the atmosphere of an ancient shrine devoted to forgotten spirits.
